SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is made on this 1st day of October 2023 between the following parties:

1. **Dr. Sarah Tan**, NRIC No. S7532156F, residing at 123 Fictional Lane, #05-01, Singapore 678910, and reachable at +65 8123 4567, email: sarah.tan@example.sg.
   
2. **Mr. John Lim**, NRIC No. S8345672A, with business registration number (UEN) T12LL3456X, and office located at 456 Imaginary Avenue, #10-02, Singapore 234567.

3. **Tech Innovations Pte Ltd**, UEN: 200312345N, situated at 789 Conceptual Road, #15-03, Singapore 345678, phone: +65 9234 5678, email: contact@techinnovations.sg.

WHEREAS, the parties hereto have agreed to enter into this SHA to govern their respective rights and obligations as shareholders. The total investment by Dr. Sarah Tan and Mr. John Lim amounts to SGD $1,000,000.

The parties acknowledge that there is currently no project plan that specifically outlines the project status for the development phases, and such plan shall be developed post-execution of the SHA.

For more information, please visit https://example.sg/user/S8345672A.
